name: chain_ph_launch_fig_prompt_build_figma_plug
method: [PH LAUNCH] Fig Prompt: Build Figma plugins with just a prompt

stages.task: Scrape Figma Community forum + Reddit r/FigmaDesign for 'plugin request' or 'wish Figma had' posts with 10+ upvotes
Score requests by: specificity (clear use case), poster activity (active user = buyer), upvote count (demand signal), commercial potential (team/agency context). Keep score >= 7.
DM qualified users: 'Saw your request for [X plugin]. I can build it in 48h using AI — $150 flat. Want a free prototype first?' Log responses.
On positive reply: use Fig Prompt + Claude to generate plugin code, test in Figma sandbox via Playwright MCP, deliver zip + install instructions
